soloAutoMerge.signature: autoMergeSolo(cwd: string, setId: string): { transitioned: boolean }
soloAutoMerge.description: After solo execution completes, automatically transitions set status from complete to merged. Called from execute-set Step 6 when registry entry has solo: true.

soloAwareMerge.signature: detectSoloAndSkip(cwd: string, setId: string): { isSolo: boolean, message: string }
soloAwareMerge.description: Merge skill detects solo sets and returns informational message instead of attempting merge operations.

soloAwareReview.signature: adjustReviewForSolo(cwd: string, setId: string): { postMerge: boolean }
soloAwareReview.description: Review skill detects solo+merged sets and switches to post-merge review mode instead of rejecting them.

reliableStateTransition.signature: transitionSet(cwd: string, setId: string, targetStatus: string): void
reliableStateTransition.description: Depends on the execute-set state transition fix for reliable complete -> merged transition in solo mode.

solo-auto-merge.description: Solo sets (registry entry solo: true) must auto-transition from complete to merged after execution finishes. No worktree merge ceremony required.

merge-skip-solo.description: Merge skill must detect solo sets and display informational message rather than attempting git merge operations.

review-accepts-solo-merged.description: Review skill must accept solo+merged status combination and operate in post-merge mode, not reject with status error.

definition.scope: Complete the solo mode lifecycle so solo sets work seamlessly on main without merge ceremony. Auto-transition solo sets to merged after execution, update merge and review skills for solo awareness.

tasks.description: Add solo auto-merge logic to execute-set: after execution completes, check registry for solo: true and auto-transition complete -> merged
tasks.acceptance: Solo sets reach merged status without manual merge command

tasks.description: Update merge skill to detect solo sets and display informational skip message
tasks.acceptance: Merge on a solo set shows informational message, does not attempt git merge

tasks.description: Update review skill to accept solo+merged status and switch to post-merge review mode
tasks.acceptance: Review accepts and operates on solo+merged sets

tasks.description: Update status display to correctly reflect solo merged state
tasks.acceptance: Status command shows solo sets as merged correctly

acceptance: Solo sets auto-transition to merged after execution
Merge skill handles solo sets gracefully
Review skill works on solo+merged sets
No regression in normal set lifecycle
